# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { getRepository } from 'typeorm';
import { Product } from './entities/Product';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const ALLOWED_COLUMNS = ['name', 'price', 'category', 'brand', 'stock', 'created_at'];
const ALLOWED_OPERATORS = ['=', '>', '<', '>=', '<=', 'LIKE', 'IN'];
const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS = ['name', 'price', 'stock', 'created_at'];
const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = ['ASC', 'DESC'];

interface ProductSearchQuery {
  name?: string;
  category?: string;
  brand?: string;
  minPrice?: string;
  maxPrice?: string;
  minStock?: string;
  maxStock?: string;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortOrder?: string;
  limit?: string;
  offset?: string;
}

function validateColumn(column: string): string | null {
  return ALLOWED_COLUMNS.includes(column) ? column : null;
}

function validateOperator(operator: string): string | null {
  return ALLOWED_OPERATORS.includes(operator) ? operator : null;
}

function validateSortColumn(column: string): string | null {
  return ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS.includes(column) ? column : null;
}

function validateSortDirection(direction: string): string | null {
  const upper = direction.toUpperCase();
  return ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.includes(upper) ? upper : null;
}

app.get('/api/products/search', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const query = req.query as ProductSearchQuery;
    
    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM product WHERE 1=1';
    const parameters: any[] = [];
    let paramIndex = 1;

    if (query.name) {
      sql += ` AND name LIKE $${paramIndex}`;
      parameters.push(`%${query.name}%`);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    if (query.category) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('category');
      if (validColumn) {
        sql += ` AND ${validColumn} = $${paramIndex}`;
        parameters.push(query.category);
        paramIndex++;
      }
    }

    if (query.brand) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('brand');
      if (validColumn) {
        sql += ` AND ${validColumn} = $${paramIndex}`;
        parameters.push(query.brand);
        paramIndex++;
      }
    }

    if (query.minPrice) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('price');
      const validOperator = validateOperator('>=');
      if (validColumn && validOperator) {
        const minPrice = parseFloat(query.minPrice);
        if (!isNaN(minPrice)) {
          sql += ` AND ${validColumn} ${validOperator} $${paramIndex}`;
          parameters.push(minPrice);
          paramIndex++;
        }
      }
    }

    if (query.maxPrice) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('price');
      const validOperator = validateOperator('<=');
      if (validColumn && validOperator) {
        const maxPrice = parseFloat(query.maxPrice);
        if (!isNaN(maxPrice)) {
          sql += ` AND ${validColumn} ${validOperator} $${paramIndex}`;
          parameters.push(maxPrice);
          paramIndex++;
        }
      }
    }

    if (query.minStock) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('stock');
      const validOperator = validateOperator('>=');
      if (validColumn && validOperator) {
        const minStock = parseInt(query.minStock);
        if (!isNaN(minStock)) {
          sql += ` AND ${validColumn} ${validOperator} $${paramIndex}`;
          parameters.push(minStock);
          paramIndex++;
        }
      }
    }

    if (query.maxStock) {
      const validColumn = validateColumn('stock');
      const validOperator = validateOperator('<=');
      if (validColumn && validOperator) {
        const maxStock = parseInt(query.maxStock);
        if (!isNaN(maxStock)) {
          sql += ` AND ${validColumn} ${validOperator} $${paramIndex}`;
          parameters.push(maxStock);
          paramIndex++;
        }
      }
    }

    if (query.sortBy) {
      const validSortColumn = validateSortColumn(query.sortBy);
      if (validSortColumn) {
        const sortDirection = query.sortOrder 
          ? validateSortDirection(query.sortOrder) 
          : 'ASC';
        if (sortDirection) {
          sql += ` ORDER BY ${validSortColumn} ${sortDirection}`;
        }
      }
    } else {
      sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
    }

    const limit = query.limit ? parseInt(query.limit) : 50;
    const offset = query.offset ? parseInt(query.offset) : 0;

    if (!isNaN(limit) && limit > 0 && limit <= 1000) {
      sql += ` LIMIT $${paramIndex}`;
      parameters.push(limit);
      paramIndex++;
    } else {
      sql += ` LIMIT $${paramIndex}`;
      parameters.push(50);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    if (!isNaN(offset) && offset >= 0) {
      sql += ` OFFSET $${paramIndex}`;
      parameters.push(offset);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);
    const products = await productRepository.query(sql, parameters);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      count: products.length,
      data: products
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Product search error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: 'Error searching products'
    });
  }
});

export default app;
